overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district with elevated highways, large satellite dishes, and neon billboards. The player character moves from a shaded underpass into sunlit streets, crosses a road, and continues along a covered walkway as a flying vehicle passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with industrial satellite dishes

events.description: moving from deep shadow under overpass into dappled sunlight
turning right to follow the road beneath the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway structure toward the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with metal support beams
large white satellite dishes visible in the distance against blue sky
large digital billboard with pink neon text mounted on the overpass
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in deep shadow. The camera moves forward, emerging into dappled sunlight that reveals large satellite dishes in the distance. A prominent pink neon billboard reading 'Watson Whore' becomes visible on the right as the camera turns to follow the road beneath the concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into open street intersection
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk between moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road at the yellow crosswalk while navigating through light traffic

notable_agents.action: green vintage sedan driving past the crosswalk from left to right
pedestrian in light clothing crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys with red and white stripes against the skyline
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black stripes
large dark industrial building with metal ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a sunlit industrial intersection. The camera crosses a broad yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating between a green vintage car and other vehicles. Industrial smokestacks rise in the distance while pedestrians cross paths with the camera. A large black industrial building becomes prominent on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway alongside industrial facility with large ventilation pipes

events.description: entering covered walkway beside industrial building with large pipes
passing the illuminated vertical Kiroshi sign on the building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the industrial ventilation facility

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive orange industrial pipes running vertically along the building exterior
tall vertical illuminated sign with white lettering on the building
concrete dividers separating the pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered walkway beside a massive industrial building characterized by large orange ventilation pipes. The path is lined with concrete barriers on the right separating it from the road. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and a tall illuminated 'Kiroshi' sign becomes visible on the building ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with flying vehicle traffic overhead

events.description: flying AV vehicle enters view overhead from the right
camera tilts upward to track the flying vehicle passing above

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the flying vehicle passing overhead while continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: flying aerodyne vehicle with blue thrusters and advertising screens cruising overhead

entered.detail: futuristic flying car with blue thrusters and illuminated undercarriage
tall contemporary skyscraper visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues along the covered walkway, a flying AV vehicle suddenly appears overhead, moving from right to left across the sky. The camera tilts upward to track the vehicle as it passes above, revealing its blue thrusters and advertising screens. The industrial building recedes into the distance as a modern glass tower becomes visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the deep shadows of an urban underpass into a bright, sprawling industrial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving forward into dappled sunlight that reveals distant satellite dishes and a prominent pink neon billboard. As the camera emerges from the concrete structure, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where it crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk between vintage cars and towering smokestacks. The path then shifts toward a covered walkway lined with orange ventilation pipes and concrete barriers, passing pedestrians and a glowing Kiroshi sign. Finally, the camera tilts upward to track a flying AV vehicle with blue thrusters as it streaks across the sky, leaving the industrial buildings behind to reveal a modern glass tower on the horizon.
